name: Mosquito

attacks.name: Poke
attacks.tell: It lines up with the player and thrusts its beak forward in a short stab.
attacks.howToAvoid: Hit it before it stabilizes or block at the end of the approach.
attacks.notes: Its basic strike and the main way it begins filling its blood sack.

attacks.name: Combo Poke
attacks.tell: It hovers at mid range and follows up with several quick thrusts.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block the full sequence or strafe before the second hit arrives.
attacks.notes: Its more persistent version of the basic poke once it has tempo.

attacks.name: Loop Divebomb
attacks.tell: It pulls away, loops through the air, and comes back in a long charge.
attacks.howToAvoid: Keep strafing until the loop finishes and the dive misses.
attacks.notes: Its strongest move and the one that punishes standing still the most.

description: A flying predator of the yard’s wet areas. Its mobility and ability to regain health on hit make it an annoying threat even when it fights alone.
behavior: It spends much of its time hovering within a confined airspace, occasionally landing on leaves or the ground. It also feeds on aphid honeydew when not in combat.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks the player on sight and is quite persistent, although it will not dive underwater to keep chasing. If it lands enough hits, it can fill its blood sack and later drop it as loot.
interactionWithCreatures: It stays neutral toward most creatures unless struck first. Wasps and wasp drones are especially aggressive toward mosquitoes and often kill them.
strategy: Fresh damage and cutting weapons work very well. The key is denying free life steal: punish it on approach and do not stand still when it begins the loop dive.
specialTraits: Every hit that lands restores health equal to 75% of the damage it deals.
